prompt: I need to add a multi-select planogram picker to my standalone OA control. When the user clicks a button, it should open the built-in OA planogram explorer with multi-select enabled, and I need to receive the selected planogram keys back in my control.

assertions.name: implements-ipopupcontrolsubscriber
assertions.description: Control implements IPopupControlSubscriber (not a custom popup — uses the built-in explorer)

assertions.name: subscribes-to-jsdkeylist-in-constructor
assertions.description: Constructor subscribes to PublishedKey.JsDBKeyList (the multi-select result key)

assertions.name: opens-correct-explorer-name
assertions.description: Popup opened with PageKey from GetPageKey("CKB Multi-select Planogram Explorer") — exact page name used

assertions.name: receive-splits-by-hash
assertions.description: Receive() method splits the returned keys by '#' delimiter (e.g. JsDBKeyList is '#'-delimited, not comma or space)
